principles.local_source_of_truth: Runtime JSON/JSONL under EZRAS_RUNTIME_ROOT (NTE memory, global memory, databank) is the authoritative artifact chain for execution, federation, and governance reads.
principles.remote_role: Supabase (when configured) is remote durability, inspection, and optional aggregation — not a replacement for local append-only truth during the session.
principles.mirroring: trade_events rows and selected shark_state keys may be upserted to Supabase after local write succeeds; local write is never rolled back on remote failure.
principles.live_requirement: Live trading requires explicit EZRAS_RUNTIME_ROOT (or equivalent session root), resolvable databank root (TRADE_DATABANK_MEMORY_ROOT or EZRAS_RUNTIME_ROOT/databank), writable governance log sink, and for remote-sync stance: SUPABASE_URL + SUPABASE_KEY (or service role via preflight-accepted vars).

sync_semantics.local_raw_event_success: Row appended to local trade_events.jsonl and/or trade_memory updated on disk.
sync_semantics.partial_success: Local OK, remote upsert False (logged warning — operator should monitor).
sync_semantics.hard_failure: Local write fails or DatabankRootUnsetError — must not claim trade recorded.
